# skill-selector

> Meta-skill for picking project skills via APM. Invoke ONLY when the user explicitly asks to set up apm.yml, choose which skills a project needs, or evaluate a catalog match — do NOT auto-invoke on routine project-init or apm-management tasks. Two-phase: pick from a curated catalog first; only escalate to broader search/evaluation when the catalog has no fit. Avoids the failure mode of impulse-installing skills you never use or hand-searching GitHub when a vetted answer already exists.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/skill-selector
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/skill-selector
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add HukuKaich0u/agent-kit --skill skill-selector
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/skill-selector ~/.claude/skills/skill-selector
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->

# skill-selector

プロジェクトの signal(package.json / wrangler.toml など)を見て、curated catalog から入れるべき skill を選んで APM で install するための meta skill です。まず catalog から選び、合うものが無いときだけ `skill-finder` の探索に escalate します。

Claude / Codex の両方で使う前提で整えています。catalog は [references/catalog.md](references/catalog.md)、選定フローは [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) を参照してください。
